title: Unstable Unfathon - MODPACK
description: This is a Modpack designed for The Unfathon to optimize gameplay and prevent light level kicks
body:
![The Unfathon - Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/295087b069278ded10d1e96e584ffe31df14be8d.png)
This is The Unfathon Modpack
This is meant to be used for the Unfathon SMP, A server like the unstable smp with many of the same builds that UU has, This modpack provides preformance, Anti Light level kicks, Armor hud mod, and much more

From Joining The Unfathon SMP spawning you can make your way to anywhere on the unstable smp after bypassing a few withers
Merchant city, Law HQ, Capital city, Northern council It is all there

Our Plan Is to Recreate every build from unstable and make it here for you to survive
We plan to even have the farlands and the underworld


WIP Large scale projects: Great Sea, The Amplified
WIP UU Builds: New New Flame base, Wemmbu and Eggchan house, Wheat Civ, merchant city battlegrounds, Mesa Mafia stash, Mafia city, Old Capital city

As we progress we will also be adding priority Queue and a Queue Happy hour


This modpack supports both Vulkan and Sodium
